title: A Week in the French Riviera's Paradise

scenes.text: Glimpse the dazzling coastlines and luxury of the French Riviera.
This is the French Riviera, located in southeastern France along the Mediterranean Sea.
The Riviera is known for its glamorous resorts and stunning coastal views.
Experience the vibrant culture and local cuisine.
scenes.label: VIBRANT CULTURE

scenes.text: Follow to see the world's hidden places.

description: 📍 French Riviera, Southeastern France - France. A lavish coastline filled with cultural treasures and stunning views. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
